# opnsense_quagga_ospf_area (Data Source)

Look up an existing OSPF area in the OPNsense FRR/Quagga plugin by UUID without importing it into Terraform management.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "opnsense_quagga_ospf_area" "example" {
  id = "12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012"
}

output "quagga_ospf_area_id" {
  value = data.opnsense_quagga_ospf_area.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `area_id` (String) OSPF area ID in dotted IPv4 format.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this OSPF area is enabled.
- `type` (String) OSPF area type.
